ddls:
CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* The keyword phrase for clothing search */,
  "global_search_volume" INTEGER /* The total monthly search volume globally */,
  "cost_per_click" REAL /* Cost per click for advertising with the keyword */,
  "paid_difficulty" INTEGER /* Difficulty rating for paid advertising */,
  "long_tail_keyword" INTEGER /* Whether the keyword is a long-tail keyword */,
  "search_volume_trend" REAL /* Average monthly change in search volume */,
  "seasonal_relevance" TEXT /* Seasonal relevance of the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Retail price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Number of units available in stock */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_images" TEXT /* Comma-separated URLs of product images */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating from customer feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if any) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "total_budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "ad_platforms" TEXT /* Comma-separated ad platforms used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for performance metrics */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign being tracked */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword associated with the campaign */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Total number of clicks generated */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Total impressions received */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Total conversions resulting from the campaign */,
  "cost_per_conversion" REAL /* Average cost per conversion */,
  "return_on_ad_spend" REAL /* Return on ad spend (ROAS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_performance_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_performance_keyword_id FOREIGN KEY ("keyword_id") REFERENCES keywords ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount generated from the sale */,
  "discount_applied" INTEGER /* Whether a discount was applied */,
  "coupon_code" TEXT /* Coupon code used (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, marketer, analyst) */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in inventory */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product currently available */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which a reorder is triggered */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when inventory falls below the reorder level */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact person at the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keyword_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword being tracked */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date the performance data was recorded */,
  "search_volume" INTEGER /* Total search volume for the keyword on the recorded date */,
  "average_cpc" REAL /* Average cost per click for the keyword on the recorded date */,
  "trend_category" TEXT /* Category of the trend (e.g., seasonal, steady, volatile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keyword_trends_keyword_id FOREIGN KEY ("keyword_id") REFERENCES keywords ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "data_summary" TEXT /* Summary of data insights from the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., keyword performance, sales analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_spend" (
  "spend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spending record */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign for which the spend is recorded */,
  "amount_spent" REAL /* Amount of money spent on the campaign */,
  "date_spent" TEXT /* Date the spending occurred */,
  "ad_platform" TEXT /* Ad platform used for the campaign (e.g., Google Ads, Facebook) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_spend_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the product (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "recommendation" INTEGER /* Whether the user recommends the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variations" (
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variation */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product with variations */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute (e.g., size, color) */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute (e.g., XL, Red) */,
  "price_offset" REAL /* Price offset for the variation (positive or negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_options" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping option */,
  "shipping_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping option */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping option */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the shipping option */,
  "delivery_time" INTEGER /* Estimated delivery time in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_keywords" (
  "product_keyword_id" INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  "product_id" INTEGER,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER,
  FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"),
  FOREIGN KEY ("keyword_id") REFERENCES keywords ("keyword_id")
)
